title: The Night Juicer
overview: Captain Olimar makes his favorite juice as Pikmin sneak a peek at the process.

title: Treasure in a Bottle
overview: A red Pikmin finds an oddly shaped, clear container in the grass. But can he get the treasure inside?

title: Occupational Hazards
overview: A group of Pikmin discovers a mountain of treasure in a construction zone. Unfortunately, something else finds it, too.
